creator: mike.jakubik@intertainservices.com
text:
This does not fix the problem for me. I am running 9-STABLE as of Apr
16, and still experience this error.

root@jail.local:~# uname -a
FreeBSD jail.local 9.0-STABLE FreeBSD 9.0-STABLE #0: Mon Apr 16 12:25:06
EDT 2012     root@jail.local:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/JAIL  amd64

root@jail.local:~# jail -U root -i /jails/web web.local
'"10.57.227.98"' /bin/sh /etc/rc
jail: unknown parameter: allow.nomount

root@jail.local:~# /etc/rc.d/jail start 
Configuring jails:.
Starting jails: cannot start jail "web": 
.

+ echo ' cannot start jail "web": '
 cannot start jail "web": 
+ tail +2 /tmp/jail.LJMEekMV/jail.31007
jail: unknown parameter: allow.nomount
